channel.title: Go-Kit on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Go-Kit on Pi Stack

item.title: Self-Hosted Microservices Frameworks 2026: Dapr vs go-micro vs go-kit
item.description: Building microservices from scratch means reinventing service discovery, retries, pub/sub, and state management on every project. A good microservices framework abstracts these cross-cutting concerns so your team focuses on business logic. This guide compares three leading self-hosted frameworks: Dapr, go-micro, and go-kit — examining their architectures, deployment models, and real-world tradeoffs.
